description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Library builds (shared) that runs on push to master, main, develop, and actions_shared branches, as well as tags matching v*, and on pull requests to master, main, and develop branches. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build on windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, and macOS-latest environments. It checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies, extracts the CoolProp version, configures and builds with CMake, and archives the shared library artifacts.
